name: Sleuth
description: Sleuth — DORA metrics and deployment tracking platform integrating with GitHub, Jira, and CI for change intelligence.

seo.title: Sleuth — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Sleuth: Sleuth — DORA metrics and deployment tracking platform integrating with GitHub, Jira, and CI for change intelligence.

when_to_use: DORA metrics tracking from GitHub and Jira data
Deployment frequency and change failure rate dashboards
Change intelligence correlating deploys with incidents
Team-level deployment health with automatic attribution

pros: Deployment tracking tied to DORA metrics natively
GitHub, Jira and CI integrations out of the box
cons: Narrower scope than Jellyfish or LinearB
Insights UI limited vs full analytics platforms
Pricing gets expensive at enterprise scale
review.verdict: Focused DORA and deploy-tracking tool that nails its lane; complements rather than replaces broader EM platforms.
review.best_for: Engineering teams prioritizing deployment visibility and accurate DORA change metrics.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a full engineering intelligence platform with forecasting and cost.
